title: alsinanthus serpyllifolius
intro: Alsinanthus serpyllifolius, also known as the Dune Sweetbox or Creeping Sweetbox, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alsinanthus serpyllifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
